title: China/African Cooperation is Truly a Win-Win Relationship
description: Jason Ross proves China’s massive investments of infrastructure into the nations of Africa are truly beneficial for both parties.  China's Belt and Road Initiative is changing the potential of the future of African nations by breaking from the past of the colonial powers and delivering what the continent actually needs: science, infrastructure and cooperation.

chapters.title: Lyndon H. LaRouche, Jr. Dr. Karl Marx Refuted (1983)
